raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-directed declaration of commitment to prioritize values over immediate emotional states",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the speaker possesses stable, identifiable values distinct from transient feelings",
    "feelings and actions can be intentionally decoupled without self-deception",
    "acting on values is an achievable choice even amid emotional resistance",
    "emotional alignment with values is desirable and potentially forthcoming"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; distinguishes cognitive/value-based choice from affective state without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "speaker has well-defined values, faces genuine emotional-value conflict, and the statement functions as a non-suppressive behavioral cue rather than denial",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "values are vague or externally imposed, emotional signals reflect genuine misalignment being overridden, or statement rationalizes chronic emotional suppression"
}
